name: Keita's Adventures on the African Savannah
short_description: The game tells the story of Keita, an African boy who followed migratory animals from Serengeti National Park to Masai Mara Wildlife Sanctuary to seek medicine for his family. On the way, he confronted dangerous wild animals…
detailed_description: The game tells the story of Keita, an African boy who followed migratory animals from Serengeti National Park to Masai Mara Wildlife Sanctuary to seek medicine for his family. On the way, he confronted dangerous wild animals…
about_the_game: The game tells the story of Keita, an African boy who followed migratory animals from Serengeti National Park to Masai Mara Wildlife Sanctuary to seek medicine for his family. On the way, he confronted dangerous wild animals…
supported_languages: English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Korean
